title: Top-Down View of Vibrant Plant-Based Meal Preparation on Rustic Wooden Table
description: A top-down view of a vibrant plant-based meal preparation setup on a rustic wooden table. The scene includes fresh vegetables such as tomatoes, leafy greens, sliced yellow bell peppers, red onions, and cherry tomatoes, along with bowls of grains, chickpeas, black beans, seeds, fresh herbs, avocado half, garlic cloves, olive oil, and lemon. The setting is illuminated by bright natural sunlight, creating a warm and inviting atmosphere perfect for healthy lifestyle and food service promotions.
